title: The Apartment Next Door
content: When Hannah moved into her new apartment, she expected quiet evenings and unfamiliar neighbors. Instead, she met Ben, who lived next door and kindly helped her carry heavy boxes upstairs. Over the following weeks, they often crossed paths in the hallway, shared homemade meals, and looked after each other's plants during short trips. Their friendship grew naturally without either of them forcing it. One evening, while watching the sunset from the rooftop, Ben admitted he looked forward to every unexpected meeting. Hannah smiled because she felt exactly the same.
